disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High-energy mechanism — a fall down four wooden steps with an awkward landing on the left leg about 30 minutes ago, with an audible crack at the moment of impact
trigger_question_examples: What were you doing when it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I fell down four wooden steps about half an hour ago and landed awkwardly on my left leg. I heard a horrible crack straight away.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A visible bend/angulation in the mid-lower leg with a bleeding skin wound over the site and a fragment of bone visible through the skin
trigger_question_examples: Can you see anything unusual about the shape of the leg?
Is there any wound or bleeding over the sore area?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The leg is bent at a weird angle in the middle, and there's a small bleeding cut on my shin with a bit of bone poking out through it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete loss of function of the limb — unable to bear weight or move the ankle
trigger_question_examples: Can you move your ankle or toes?
Can you stand or put any weight on it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't move my ankle at all and there's no way I can stand or put any weight on it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nausea, lightheadedness, pallor and sweating in the setting of severe pain
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Do you feel faint, sick or clammy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really sick and lightheaded, like I might pass out, and I've gone pale and sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Distal foot colour, warmth, feeling and movement — the patient/carer can report whether the foot is still pink, warm and has normal sensation
trigger_question_examples: Is the foot below the injury still its normal colour and warm?
Can he still feel you touch his foot and wiggle his toes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The foot still looks a normal colour and feels warm, and he can still feel me touch it and wiggle his toes a little.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm too scared to touch anywhere near it — do I really have to check the foot?

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medications and no pain relief taken yet
trigger_question_examples: Is he on any regular medicines?
Has he taken anything for the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's not on any regular medicines and hasn't taken anything for the pain yet.
